name: Spicy Bulgur Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the bulgur and place it in a medium bowl. Cover with cold water and let soak until it is tender to the bite (20 to 30 minutes). Drain thoroughly and squeeze out any excess water. Fluff to separate the grains.
2. Combine chopped tomatoes, fennel, parsley, cilantro, radishes, lettuce, and scallions in a large bowl.
3. Add the drained bulgur and toss until evenly mixed.
4. Whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, crushed garlic, cumin, cinnamon, Cayenne, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
5. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss until well combined.
6. Chill, covered, in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
7. Serve the salad surrounded by warm pita halves.
